name: Starlight ~ Annie January
description: Starlight, born Annie January, is a prominent character in *The Boys* TV show. She possesses superhuman abilities, including light manipulation and enhanced strength, which she uses as a member of The Seven, a renowned superhero team. Raised with strong moral values, Starlight often finds herself at odds with the corrupt and commercialized nature of Vought International. Despite the challenges, she remains committed to justice and integrity, striving to be a beacon of hope amidst the darkness of the superhero world.
creator: deadcool
